---
title: "encap_chp"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  results = "asis"
)
```
<style>
table {
  width: 100%;
  table-layout: fixed;
  border-collapse: collapse;
}

th, td {
  white-space: normal !important;
  word-wrap: break-word;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  vertical-align: top;
  padding: 4px;
}
</style>

```{r}
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(lme4)
library(mgcv)
```

```{r}
encap_chp <- readRDS(here("ValidationData", "encap_chp.rds"))
```


*Check ob AOI Kombi existiert*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

encap_chp <- encap_chp %>%
  mutate(
    AOI = as.factor(AOI),
    mechanism = as.factor(mechanism),
    info = as.factor(info)
  )

# Prüft, ob jede mechanism-Stufe in jeder AOI vorkommt
mech_check <- encap_chp %>%
  count(AOI, mechanism) %>%
  complete(AOI, mechanism, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  arrange(AOI, mechanism)

# Prüft, ob jede info-Stufe in jeder AOI vorkommt
info_check <- encap_chp %>%
  count(AOI, info) %>%
  complete(AOI, info, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  arrange(AOI, info)

# Fehlende Kombinationen direkt anzeigen
missing_mech <- mech_check %>% filter(n == 0)
missing_info <- info_check %>% filter(n == 0)

#mech_check
#info_check

knitr::kable(
  missing_mech
,
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)

knitr::kable(
  missing_info,
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```


TRT: mod_trt <- glmmTMB(TRT ~ mechanism*AOI + info*AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant), data = encap_chp, family = Gamma(link = "log"))

*TRT: Full Data Fit Problems*
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(stringr)
library(glmmTMB)
library(lme4)

# =========================================================
# HILFSFUNKTIONEN
# =========================================================

safe_plain_df <- function(df) {
  out <- as.data.frame(df, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  rownames(out) <- NULL
  out
}

round_df_4 <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 4)))
}

collapse_unique <- function(x) {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paste(x, collapse = " | ")
}

calc_fit_metrics <- function(obs, pred) {
  keep <- is.finite(obs) & is.finite(pred)
  obs  <- obs[keep]
  pred <- pred[keep]

  if (length(obs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      n_obs_metric = 0L,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    ))
  }

  err <- pred - obs

  tibble(
    n_obs_metric = length(obs),
    rmse_in_sample = sqrt(mean(err^2)),
    mae_in_sample = mean(abs(err)),
    bias_in_sample = mean(err),
    cor_obs_pred = suppressWarnings(stats::cor(obs, pred))
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DATEN
# =========================================================

prep_encap_chp_fullfit_data <- function(df) {
  needed <- c(
    "TRT", "nLetters", "Participant", "Topic", "AOI", "aggr_level",
    "mechanism", "info"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(needed, names(df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop("Fehlende Variablen: ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
  }

  out <- df %>%
    filter(!is.na(TRT), TRT > 0) %>%
    filter(!is.na(nLetters)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Participant), !is.na(Topic), !is.na(AOI), !is.na(aggr_level)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(mechanism), !is.na(info)) %>%
    mutate(
      Participant = factor(Participant),
      Topic = factor(Topic),
      AOI = factor(AOI),
      aggr_level = factor(aggr_level),
      mechanism = factor(mechanism),
      info = factor(info)
    )

  cluster_sizes <- out %>%
    distinct(aggr_level, AOI) %>%
    count(aggr_level, name = "n_aoi_in_cluster")

  list(
    data = safe_plain_df(out),
    cluster_sizes = cluster_sizes
  )
}

# =========================================================
# FORMELN PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

make_formula_cluster_encap_chp <- function(response = "TRT",
                                           n_aoi_in_cluster = 1L) {
  rhs <- if (n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    "mechanism * AOI + info * AOI + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  } else {
    "mechanism + info + nLetters + (1 | Topic) + (1 | Participant)"
  }

  as.formula(paste(response, "~", rhs))
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGN-CHECKS
# =========================================================

check_cells <- function(df, var, aoi = "AOI") {
  aoi_levels <- levels(df[[aoi]])
  var_levels <- levels(df[[var]])

  obs <- df %>%
    dplyr::count(.data[[aoi]], .data[[var]], name = "n")

  full_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    AOI__tmp = aoi_levels,
    VAR__tmp = var_levels
  ) %>%
    rename(!!aoi := AOI__tmp, !!var := VAR__tmp)

  full_grid %>%
    left_join(obs, by = c(aoi, var)) %>%
    mutate(
      n = tidyr::replace_na(n, 0L),
      present = n > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(.data[[aoi]], .data[[var]])
}

summarise_cell_check <- function(cell_tbl, var_name) {
  tibble(
    factor_name = var_name,
    n_cells_total = nrow(cell_tbl),
    n_cells_present = sum(cell_tbl$present),
    n_cells_missing = sum(!cell_tbl$present),
    missing_cells = if (sum(!cell_tbl$present) == 0) {
      NA_character_
    } else {
      paste0(
        cell_tbl %>%
          dplyr::filter(!present) %>%
          transmute(txt = paste0(AOI, " x ", .data[[var_name]])) %>%
          pull(txt),
        collapse = "; "
      )
    }
  )
}

within_aoi_variation <- function(df, var, aoi = "AOI") {
  df %>%
    group_by(.data[[aoi]]) %>%
    summarise(
      n_levels = n_distinct(.data[[var]]),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      factor_name = var,
      has_variation = n_levels >= 2
    ) %>%
    rename(AOI = .data[[aoi]])
}

summarise_within_aoi_variation <- function(var_tbl, var_name) {
  tibble(
    factor_name = var_name,
    n_aoi_total = nrow(var_tbl),
    n_aoi_without_variation = sum(!var_tbl$has_variation),
    aoi_without_variation = if (sum(!var_tbl$has_variation) == 0) {
      NA_character_
    } else {
      paste(var_tbl$AOI[!var_tbl$has_variation], collapse = "; ")
    }
  )
}

inspect_design_structure_encap_chp <- function(df) {
  cell_mechanism <- check_cells(df, "mechanism")
  cell_info      <- check_cells(df, "info")

  cell_summary <- bind_rows(
    summarise_cell_check(cell_mechanism, "mechanism"),
    summarise_cell_check(cell_info, "info")
  )

  var_mechanism <- within_aoi_variation(df, "mechanism")
  var_info      <- within_aoi_variation(df, "info")

  variation_summary <- bind_rows(
    summarise_within_aoi_variation(var_mechanism, "mechanism"),
    summarise_within_aoi_variation(var_info, "info")
  )

  missing_cells_any <- any(cell_summary$n_cells_missing > 0)
  no_variation_any  <- any(variation_summary$n_aoi_without_variation > 0)

  tibble(
    design_missing_cells_any = missing_cells_any,
    design_no_variation_any = no_variation_any,
    design_missing_mechanism_cells = cell_summary$missing_cells[cell_summary$factor_name == "mechanism"],
    design_missing_info_cells = cell_summary$missing_cells[cell_summary$factor_name == "info"],
    design_aoi_without_mechanism_variation = variation_summary$aoi_without_variation[variation_summary$factor_name == "mechanism"],
    design_aoi_without_info_variation = variation_summary$aoi_without_variation[variation_summary$factor_name == "info"]
  )
}

# =========================================================
# DESIGNMATRIX-CHECK
# =========================================================

inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_chp <- function(df, formula) {
  fixed_formula <- lme4::nobars(formula)
  mf_fixed <- model.frame(fixed_formula, data = droplevels(df), na.action = na.omit)
  X <- model.matrix(fixed_formula, data = mf_fixed)

  qrX <- qr(X)
  rankX <- qrX$rank
  pX <- ncol(X)
  rankdef <- rankX < pX

  redundant_cols <- if (rankdef) {
    pivot <- qrX$pivot
    redundant_idx <- pivot[seq.int(rankX + 1, pX)]
    colnames(X)[redundant_idx]
  } else {
    character(0)
  }

  tibble(
    X_rank = rankX,
    X_ncol = pX,
    fit_rank_deficient = rankdef,
    redundant_cols = collapse_unique(redundant_cols),
    n_distinct_AOI = dplyr::n_distinct(df$AOI),
    n_distinct_mechanism = dplyr::n_distinct(df$mechanism),
    n_distinct_info = dplyr::n_distinct(df$info),
    n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df$nLetters),
    min_nLetters = min(df$nLetters),
    max_nLetters = max(df$nLetters)
  )
}

# =========================================================
# GLMMTMB FIT MIT STATUS-CHECK
# =========================================================

fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_chp <- function(df, formula) {
  warn_texts <- character()
  msg_texts  <- character()

  fit <- withCallingHandlers(
    tryCatch(
      glmmTMB::glmmTMB(
        formula = formula,
        data = droplevels(df),
        family = Gamma(link = "log")
      ),
      error = function(e) e
    ),
    warning = function(w) {
      warn_texts <<- c(warn_texts, conditionMessage(w))
      invokeRestart("muffleWarning")
    },
    message = function(m) {
      msg_texts <<- c(msg_texts, conditionMessage(m))
      invokeRestart("muffleMessage")
    }
  )

  if (inherits(fit, "error")) {
    return(list(
      fit_tbl = tibble(
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = conditionMessage(fit),
        fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
        fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
        n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
        n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_
      ),
      fit_obj = NULL
    ))
  }

  fit_nonposdef_hessian <- tryCatch(
    !isTRUE(fit$sdr$pdHess),
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  fit_nonzero_convergence <- tryCatch(
    {
      conv <- fit$fit$convergence
      if (is.null(conv)) NA else conv != 0
    },
    error = function(e) NA
  )

  list(
    fit_tbl = tibble(
      fit_ok = TRUE,
      fit_error = NA_character_,
      fit_warning_text = collapse_unique(warn_texts),
      fit_message_text = collapse_unique(msg_texts),
      n_warning_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(warn_texts))),
      n_messages = length(unique(stats::na.omit(msg_texts))),
      fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
      fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
      aic = tryCatch(as.numeric(AIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      bic = tryCatch(as.numeric(BIC(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_),
      logLik = tryCatch(as.numeric(logLik(fit)), error = function(e) NA_real_)
    ),
    fit_obj = fit
  )
}

# =========================================================
# KLASSIFIKATION PROBLEMART
# =========================================================

classify_problem_encap_chp <- function(fit_rank_deficient,
                                       fit_warning_text,
                                       fit_message_text,
                                       fit_error,
                                       fit_nonposdef_hessian,
                                       fit_nonzero_convergence,
                                       design_missing_cells_any,
                                       design_no_variation_any) {
  txt <- paste(
    c(fit_warning_text, fit_message_text, fit_error),
    collapse = " | "
  )

  case_when(
    !is.na(fit_error) ~ "fit_error",
    isTRUE(fit_nonposdef_hessian) ~ "nonposdef_hessian",
    isTRUE(fit_nonzero_convergence) ~ "nonzero_convergence",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) & (design_missing_cells_any | design_no_variation_any) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "design_driven_rank_deficiency_with_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) & (design_missing_cells_any | design_no_variation_any) ~
      "design_driven_rank_deficiency",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) &
      str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_design_and_fit_signal",
    isTRUE(fit_rank_deficient) ~ "rank_deficient_design",
    str_detect(txt, regex("rank-deficient|dropping columns|dropp.*column", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "rank_deficient_warning_without_matrix_flag",
    str_detect(txt, regex("hessian|singular|not positive definite|non-positive-definite", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "hessian_or_singularity_signal",
    str_detect(txt, regex("convergence|did not converge|false convergence|iteration limit", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
      "convergence_signal",
    (!is.na(fit_warning_text) || !is.na(fit_message_text)) ~ "warning_or_message_only",
    TRUE ~ "none"
  )
}

# =========================================================
# EIN FULL-DATA-FIT PRO aggr_level
# =========================================================

fit_one_full_case_encap_chp <- function(df_aggr,
                                        formula,
                                        exp_name = "encap_chp",
                                        aggr_i,
                                        n_aoi_in_cluster) {
  df_aggr <- droplevels(df_aggr)

  n_levels_aoi <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$AOI)
  n_levels_mechanism <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$mechanism)
  n_levels_info <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$info)
  n_levels_topic <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Topic)
  n_levels_participant <- dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$Participant)

  if (n_levels_mechanism < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
        n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
        n_topics = n_levels_topic,
        n_participants = n_levels_participant,
        formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " "),
        X_rank = NA_real_,
        X_ncol = NA_real_,
        fit_rank_deficient = NA,
        redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI = n_levels_aoi,
        n_distinct_mechanism = n_levels_mechanism,
        n_distinct_info = n_levels_info,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(df_aggr$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(df_aggr$nLetters),
        design_missing_cells_any = NA,
        design_no_variation_any = NA,
        design_missing_mechanism_cells = NA_character_,
        design_missing_info_cells = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_mechanism_variation = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_info_variation = NA_character_,
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "mechanism has fewer than 2 levels in full data for this aggr_level",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
        rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
        mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
        bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
        cor_obs_pred = NA_real_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_mechanism"
      )
    )
  }

  if (n_levels_info < 2) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
        n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
        n_topics = n_levels_topic,
        n_participants = n_levels_participant,
        formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " "),
        X_rank = NA_real_,
        X_ncol = NA_real_,
        fit_rank_deficient = NA,
        redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI = n_levels_aoi,
        n_distinct_mechanism = n_levels_mechanism,
        n_distinct_info = n_levels_info,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(df_aggr$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(df_aggr$nLetters),
        design_missing_cells_any = NA,
        design_no_variation_any = NA,
        design_missing_mechanism_cells = NA_character_,
        design_missing_info_cells = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_mechanism_variation = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_info_variation = NA_character_,
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "info has fewer than 2 levels in full data for this aggr_level",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
        rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
        mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
        bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
        cor_obs_pred = NA_real_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_info"
      )
    )
  }

  if (n_levels_aoi < 2 && n_aoi_in_cluster > 1) {
    return(
      tibble(
        experiment = exp_name,
        aggr_level = aggr_i,
        n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
        n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
        n_topics = n_levels_topic,
        n_participants = n_levels_participant,
        formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " "),
        X_rank = NA_real_,
        X_ncol = NA_real_,
        fit_rank_deficient = NA,
        redundant_cols = NA_character_,
        n_distinct_AOI = n_levels_aoi,
        n_distinct_mechanism = n_levels_mechanism,
        n_distinct_info = n_levels_info,
        n_distinct_nLetters = dplyr::n_distinct(df_aggr$nLetters),
        min_nLetters = min(df_aggr$nLetters),
        max_nLetters = max(df_aggr$nLetters),
        design_missing_cells_any = NA,
        design_no_variation_any = NA,
        design_missing_mechanism_cells = NA_character_,
        design_missing_info_cells = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_mechanism_variation = NA_character_,
        design_aoi_without_info_variation = NA_character_,
        fit_ok = FALSE,
        fit_error = "AOI has fewer than 2 levels although cluster is expected to contain multiple AOIs",
        fit_warning_text = NA_character_,
        fit_message_text = NA_character_,
        n_warning_messages = 0L,
        n_messages = 0L,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = NA,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = NA,
        aic = NA_real_,
        bic = NA_real_,
        logLik = NA_real_,
        n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
        rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
        mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
        bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
        cor_obs_pred = NA_real_,
        problem_type = "insufficient_levels_AOI"
      )
    )
  }

  design_structure <- inspect_design_structure_encap_chp(df_aggr)

  design_info <- inspect_design_matrix_identifiability_encap_chp(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_res <- fit_glmmtmb_capture_encap_chp(
    df = df_aggr,
    formula = formula
  )

  fit_info <- fit_res$fit_tbl
  fit_obj  <- fit_res$fit_obj

  fit_metrics <- if (!is.null(fit_obj)) {
    fitted_vals <- tryCatch(
      predict(fit_obj, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
      error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(df_aggr))
    )

    calc_fit_metrics(
      obs = df_aggr$TRT,
      pred = fitted_vals
    )
  } else {
    tibble(
      n_obs_metric = NA_real_,
      rmse_in_sample = NA_real_,
      mae_in_sample = NA_real_,
      bias_in_sample = NA_real_,
      cor_obs_pred = NA_real_
    )
  }

  tibble(
    experiment = exp_name,
    aggr_level = aggr_i,
    n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_in_cluster,
    n_obs = nrow(df_aggr),
    n_topics = n_levels_topic,
    n_participants = n_levels_participant,
    formula = paste(deparse(formula), collapse = " ")
  ) %>%
    bind_cols(design_structure) %>%
    bind_cols(design_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_info) %>%
    bind_cols(fit_metrics) %>%
    mutate(
      problem_type = classify_problem_encap_chp(
        fit_rank_deficient = fit_rank_deficient,
        fit_warning_text = fit_warning_text,
        fit_message_text = fit_message_text,
        fit_error = fit_error,
        fit_nonposdef_hessian = fit_nonposdef_hessian,
        fit_nonzero_convergence = fit_nonzero_convergence,
        design_missing_cells_any = design_missing_cells_any,
        design_no_variation_any = design_no_variation_any
      )
    )
}

# =========================================================
# FULL-DATA-FITS ÜBER aggr_level
# =========================================================

run_fullfits_encap_chp <- function(df,
                                   exp_name = "encap_chp") {
  prep <- prep_encap_chp_fullfit_data(df)
  dat <- prep$data
  cluster_sizes <- prep$cluster_sizes

  aggr_levels <- unique(as.character(dat$aggr_level))

  fullfit_all <- purrr::map_dfr(aggr_levels, function(aggr_i) {
    df_aggr <- dat %>%
      filter(as.character(aggr_level) == aggr_i)

    n_aoi_cluster <- cluster_sizes$n_aoi_in_cluster[
      match(aggr_i, as.character(cluster_sizes$aggr_level))
    ]

    formula_i <- make_formula_cluster_encap_chp(
      response = "TRT",
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )

    fit_one_full_case_encap_chp(
      df_aggr = df_aggr,
      formula = formula_i,
      exp_name = exp_name,
      aggr_i = aggr_i,
      n_aoi_in_cluster = n_aoi_cluster
    )
  })

  problem_counts <- fullfit_all %>%
    count(problem_type, sort = TRUE)

  problem_fits_only <- fullfit_all %>%
    filter(
      problem_type != "none" |
        fit_ok %in% FALSE |
        fit_nonposdef_hessian %in% TRUE |
        fit_nonzero_convergence %in% TRUE |
        fit_rank_deficient %in% TRUE |
        n_warning_messages > 0
    ) %>%
    arrange(aggr_level)

  list(
    fullfit_all = fullfit_all,
    problem_counts = problem_counts,
    problem_fits_only = problem_fits_only
  )
}

# =========================================================
# AUSFÜHREN
# =========================================================

res_encap_chp_fullfit <- run_fullfits_encap_chp(
  df = encap_chp,
  exp_name = "encap_chp"
)

# =========================================================
# OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

#round_df_4(res_encap_chp_fullfit$fullfit_all)
#round_df_4(res_encap_chp_fullfit$problem_counts)
#round_df_4(res_encap_chp_fullfit$problem_fits_only)

knitr::kable(
  round_df_4(res_encap_chp_fullfit$problem_counts),
  format = "html",
  table.attr = 'style="width:100%; table-layout: fixed;"'
)
```
